{{Quote|This thorn forest was once strong with the evil night spirit.|Logray|<ref name="Night of the Stranger">{{Ewoks|Night of the Stranger}}</ref>}}
The '''Thorn Forest''' was a large [[Forest/Legends|forest]] on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]] and location of the [[Stone Circle]], a ritual location of the [[Wizard of the Night Spirit|Wizards of the Night Spirit]]. It was apparently once dominated by the [[Night Spirit/Legends|Night Spirit]], the Ewok denotation for the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] due to its use by the evil wizards. The wizards were eventually banished from the forest moon, apparently purging the forest of its evil presence.

However, the wizards eventually returned, and the [[stranger]] entered the forest and used the Stone Circle again, imprisoning the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]] [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] in a [[Force field/Legends|force field]] within one of the stone columns. However, a [[Battle of Thorn Forest|showdown]] eventually took place in the forest between the wizards and the Ewoks, resulting in a central structure of the Stone Circle being removed as well as the final banishment of the wizards.

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|Night of the Stranger}}
